 {"id":"gt-ingm.4","title":"Rewrite role templates without step lists","description":"Update:
- prompts/roles/deacon.md
- prompts/roles/refinery.md
- prompts/roles/witness.md

Templates should describe HOW to run patrols (propulsion principle, bd mol current, bd close --continue) not WHAT the steps are. Steps come from proto beads.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-24T12:38:14.388135-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T20:54:18.973046-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-25T20:54:18.973046-08:00","close_reason":"Orphaned: referenced in commit but not closed","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-ingm.4","depends_on_id":"gt-ingm.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-24T12:38:24.049212-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-ingm.5","title":"Standardize bd mol vs gt mol commands","description":"Audit all docs and templates for command usage.

Clarify:
- gt mol = Gas Town wrapper (what does it add?)
- bd mol = Beads molecule commands (authoritative)

If gt mol is thin wrapper, consider removing.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-24T12:38:15.50826-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T22:54:55.898859-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-25T22:54:55.898859-08:00","close_reason":"Audited: gt mol has orchestrator commands (attach, status, etc), bd mol has data commands. Fixed one doc ref."}
 {"id":"gt-ingm.6","title":"Remove spawn - use pour/wisp only (see bd-8y9t)","description":"Remove bd mol spawn entirely from vocabulary.

Replace all references with:
- bd pour <proto> - Create persistent mol (liquid)
- bd wisp <proto> - Create ephemeral wisp (vapor)

'spawn' doesn't fit the chemistry metaphor. Two phase transitions (pour/wisp) are clearer than one command with flags.

See bd-XXX for Beads-side removal.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-24T12:38:16.595926-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T22:54:55.990767-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-25T22:54:55.990767-08:00","close_reason":"bd mol spawn already removed - replaced by bd pour and bd wisp create"}
-{"id":"gt-ioij","title":"mol-town-shutdown: Full Gas Town reset molecule","description":"## Summary
Molecule for clean town shutdown/restart. Sling it to Mayor when ready to reboot.

## Steps
1. Clear all inboxes (witness, refinery, crew - all rigs)
2. Unhook all agents (remove stale molecule attachments)
3. Kill any active polecats
4. Stop daemon
5. Rotate/archive logs
6. bd sync + git push
7. Send Mayor handoff (what's next)
8. Restart daemon fresh

## Invocation
```
gt hook mol-town-shutdown   # attach it
# Mayor runs it on next session
```

## Related
- Patrol cleanup (continuous) vs shutdown (nuclear)
- See gt-xxx for patrol hygiene","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-24T17:25:45.295151-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-24T17:25:45.295151-08:00"}

 {"id":"gt-is4fi","title":"Refactor formula transformation pipeline to shared helper","description":"The formula transformation pipeline (control flow, advice, expansions, aspects) is duplicated between cook.go and mol_bond.go. Should be extracted to a shared function in the formula package.

Current duplication in:
- cmd/bd/cook.go:96-136
- cmd/bd/mol_bond.go:598-633

Suggested approach:
- Add formula.Transform(resolved *Formula, parser *Parser) (*Formula, error) 
- Handles all transformation steps in order
- Both cook.go and mol_bond.go call this single function","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-25T16:50:55.343049-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T16:50:55.343049-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-is4fi","depends_on_id":"gt-8tmz.25","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2025-12-25T16:50:55.344455-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
@@ -1373,7 +1373,7 @@
 {"id":"gt-twjr5","title":"Async Coordination Gates","description":"Agents wait for external events without polling.

## Problem
Agents cannot wait for external conditions (CI completion, human approval, timers) without wasteful polling or losing state on handoff.

## Requirements
- Gate issue type in beads (type=gate)
- bd gate create --await timer:5m / gh:run:123 / human:approve / mail:pattern
- Deacon evaluates pending gates each patrol cycle
- Agents park work on gate, resume when condition met
- Gate timeout and notification

## Gate Types
- timer:<duration> - Simple delay (5m, 1h, 24h)
- gh:run:<id> - GitHub Actions run completion
- gh:pr:<id> - PR merged/closed  
- human:<prompt> - Human approval required
- mail:<pattern> - Wait for mail matching pattern

## Success Criteria
- Agent can create gate and suspend work
- Deacon wakes agent when gate condition met
- Gates survive session cycling

Consolidates gt-31eg. Parallel work with no dependencies.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-25T20:46:07.930952-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T20:46:07.930952-08:00"}
 {"id":"gt-twjr5.1","title":"Gate issue type and bd gate create","description":"Add type=gate to beads schema. Implement bd gate create command with --await flag. Gates are special issues that represent wait conditions. Example: bd gate create --await timer:5m --title 'Wait for cooldown'","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-25T20:55:44.796316-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T22:12:41.484839-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-25T22:12:41.484839-08:00","close_reason":"Already implemented in beads - TypeGate in types.go, full bd gate command in gate.go","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-twjr5.1","depends_on_id":"gt-twjr5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-25T20:55:44.7969-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-twjr5.2","title":"Timer gate evaluation","description":"Implement timer gate type. Format: timer:<duration> (5m, 1h, 24h). Deacon evaluates pending timer gates each patrol cycle. Gate closes when duration elapsed since creation. Simplest gate type - implement first.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-25T20:55:46.781785-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T22:36:25.467456-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-25T22:36:25.467456-08:00","close_reason":"Implemented bd gate eval command in beads (pushed). Added gate-evaluation step to Deacon patrol formula (pushed).","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-twjr5.2","depends_on_id":"gt-twjr5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-25T20:55:46.783602-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-twjr5.2","depends_on_id":"gt-twjr5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-25T20:56:46.669095-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"gt-twjr5.4","title":"Human and mail gates","description":"Implement human:<prompt> gate (requires explicit approval command). Implement mail:<pattern> gate (waits for mail matching pattern). These enable async human-in-loop workflows.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-25T20:55:49.832861-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T20:55:49.832861-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-twjr5.4","depends_on_id":"gt-twjr5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-25T20:55:49.833369-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-twjr5.4","depends_on_id":"gt-twjr5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-25T20:56:46.85494-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-twjr5.5","title":"Agent parking and resuming","description":"Implement gt park and gt resume commands. Agent parks work on a gate, state persists across sessions. When gate condition met, Deacon sends wake mail. Agent resumes from parked state. Critical for async workflows.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-25T20:55:51.294474-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T20:55:51.294474-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-twjr5.5","depends_on_id":"gt-twjr5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-25T20:55:51.296459-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-twjr5.5","depends_on_id":"gt-twjr5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-25T20:56:46.946883-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
